mapper.select: SELECT id_card.id_card_id, id_card.employee_id, id_card.last_renewed_date, id_card.need_to_renew_date, id_card.in_use, id_card.to_renew, id_card.created_at, id_card.updated_at, employee.name AS employee_name, employee.title AS employee_title FROM id_card LEFT JOIN employee ON id_card.employee_id = employee.employee_id WHERE id_card.id_card_id = #{idCardId}

SELECT id_card.id_card_id, id_card.employee_id, id_card.last_renewed_date, id_card.need_to_renew_date, id_card.in_use, id_card.to_renew, id_card.created_at, id_card.updated_at, employee.name AS employee_name, employee.title AS employee_title FROM id_card LEFT JOIN employee ON id_card.employee_id = employee.employee_id
SELECT id_card.*, employee.name AS employee_name, employee.title AS employee_title FROM id_card LEFT JOIN employee ON id_card.employee_id = employee.employee_id WHERE id_card.in_use = TRUE
SELECT id_card.*, employee.name AS employee_name, employee.title AS employee_title FROM id_card LEFT JOIN employee ON id_card.employee_id = employee.employee_id WHERE id_card.to_renew = TRUE

SELECT id_card.id_card_id, id_card.employee_id, id_card.last_renewed_date, id_card.need_to_renew_date, id_card.in_use, id_card.to_renew, id_card.created_at, id_card.updated_at, employee.name AS employee_name, employee.title AS employee_title FROM id_card LEFT JOIN employee ON id_card.employee_id = employee.employee_id WHERE employee.employee_id = #{employeeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO id_card (employee_id, last_renewed_date, need_to_renew_date, in_use, to_renew, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{lastRenewedDate}, #{needToRenewDate}, #{inUse}, #{toRenew}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE id_card SET employee_id = #{employeeId}, last_renewed_date = #{lastRenewedDate}, need_to_renew_date = #{needToRenewDate}, in_use = #{inUse}, to_renew = #{toRenew}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id_card_id = #{idCardId}
UPDATE id_card SET to_renew = #{state}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id_card_id = #{idCardId}
